sentences.arabic: دَعَا طَارِقٌ زَمِيلَهُ لِلْعَشَاءِ فِي بَيْتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Tariq je pozvao kolegu na večeru u svoju kuću.
sentences.translationEn: Tariq invited his colleague to dinner at his house.

sentences.translation: Njegova supruga je skuhala ukusnu hranu.
Sjeli su za sto i jeli zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: They sat at the table and ate together.

sentences.arabic: أَثْنَى الضَّيْفُ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ وَشَكَرَ الجَمِيعَ.
sentences.translation: Gost je pohvalio hranu i zahvalio svima.
sentences.translationEn: The guest praised the food and thanked everyone.

sentences.translation: Otišao je kasno, osjećajući se sretan.
